role: A token-only stylesheet that frames the session-drill overlay (FACE-1), including its modal shell, roster list, search filter, and recall-lens detail layout.
capabilities: Modal overlay shell with scrim, panel, open/closed state, and safe-area-aware centering
Header layout with title, subtitle, back, and close controls
Scrollable body with message/error/quiet and retry button styling
Search input styled as a pill with focus-visible ring
Session roster list rows with hover state and meta text
Session detail layout and recall-lens sections with bulleted lists
substance_why: The file provides a complete, token-driven visual system for the sessions overlay surface with many distinct, fully styled components.
interactions_missing: No JavaScript event handlers for open, close, back, retry, or row selection
No keyboard escape or focus-trap wiring
No loading, empty, or error retry behavior beyond static styles
No search debounce or filter logic
performance_risks: Fixed-position overlay covers full viewport and uses visibility transitions
Box-shadow and color-mix scrim may repaint on every overlay transition
Body overflow scrolling inside a max-height flex panel without content-visibility
reuse_verdict_why: The file already uses design tokens and mirrors established overlay patterns, so its structure and naming should be retained and refactored rather than discarded.
decomposition_hints: Split overlay chrome (overlay, scrim, panel, head, close) into a shared modal-shell stylesheet
Split roster pieces (search, list, row, empty/error states) into a session-roster stylesheet
Split detail/recall-lens (card, lens, sections) into a session-detail stylesheet
